sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 14.7g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.
sections.subtitleText: 14.7g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, sugar moderation is the whole game.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 8.5g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.
sections.subtitleText: 8.5g of carbs. fibre is doing a lot of the work here. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 2g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.
sections.subtitleText: 2g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. for a fruit, you want sweetness to be kept in check.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin c at 11% daily value stands out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin c at 11% daily value stands out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.
sections.subtitleText: potassium at 10% daily value stands out most. useful, but still pretty limited.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: a true outlier for fruit fat quality because this behaves nothing like typical sweet fruit and that makes the category result exceptional. easy to use as a whole food because simple, recognisable, and realistic for everyday eating. brings a clean fruit identity because it still contributes something valuable even when it is not elite.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: calorie density is much higher than most fruits because still useful, but it changes how casually you can throw it in. can be easy to waste if timing is off because perishability is a practical downside people actually feel. protein contribution is tiny because that is normal for fruit, but it still limits nutritional breadth.

closing.summary: Avocado has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
